products.description: The products you want to order

customer_reference.description: Optional customer-specific reference for the order

salutation.description: Salutation - currently supported values are '1' for 'Mr' and '2' for 'Ms'

AutoTopupRequest.title: AutoTopupRequest

enabled.description: Whether auto topup is enabled for the given SIMs

AutoTopupRequest.description: Contains a list of ICCIDs and a boolean flag for auto topup

request_timestamp.description: Time in UTC the request was received

reply_timestamp.description: Time in UTC the response was sent

from.description: The first ICCID of the range

to.description: The last ICCID of the range

order_number.description: Order No. - the unique numerical identifier for a order

order_type.description: The order type indicates whether this is a first order, additional order or a topup

invoice_number.description: Invoice No. - unique alphanumerical identifier for the corresponding invoice

invoice_amount.description: The gross value which this order amounts to, as printed on the invoice

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used for the invoice amount

sims.description: SIMs included or affected by this Order

products.description: IDs and quantity of ordered products

Ordered product.title: Ordered product
Ordered product.description: What you want and how much of it

maxQuantity.description: Maximum quantity of product per order

Product information.title: Product information

quantity.description: Quantity of SIM with this product ordered

Product information.description: General information about an ordered product

volume.description: Currently available Volume, either SMS or data in MB

total_volume.description: The total data volume or SMS this SIM has available over its lifetime

peak_throughput.description: The optional throughput in bit/s (only for data quotas)

last_volume_added.description: Amount of SMS or data volume which was last purchased for this SIM

last_status_change_date.description: Last date and time on which this quota was changed, e.g. by purchasing a TopUp

threshold_percentage.description: Threshold in percentage for which a volume notification will be send

event_type.description: A description of the event type
event_type.example: Status of SIM changed from 'Issued' to 'Activated'

alert.description: Boolean flag determining if this event is treated as an alert

event_severity.description: Textual representation of the severity of the event

SIM Event.description: Information about a Event. Besides the timestamp and the event_type all other values are optional and might not be included in the actual response

imei_lock.description: Indicates if SIM is locked to the current IMEI

current_quota.description: Current Quota for this SIM in MB

last_delivery_attempt.description: The date and time on which the last delivery was attempted

udh.description: User Data Header encoded has hex-String (optional)
